label: Median Household Income
description: Median household income in the past 12 months (inflation-adjusted). Source: ACS 5-Year Estimates 2018–2022, table B19013.

label: Poverty Rate
description: Percentage of population below the federal poverty line. Source: ACS 5-Year Estimates 2018–2022, table B17001.

label: Unemployment Rate
description: Annual average unemployment rate for 2023. Source: Bureau of Labor Statistics Local Area Unemployment Statistics.

label: Labor Force Participation
description: Percentage of the civilian noninstitutional population 16+ in the labor force. Source: ACS 5-Year Estimates, table B23025.

label: Bachelor's Degree or Higher
description: Percentage of adults 25+ with a bachelor's degree or higher. Source: ACS 5-Year Estimates, table B15003.

label: Median Home Value
description: Median value of owner-occupied housing units. Source: ACS 5-Year Estimates, table B25077.

label: Total Population
description: Total county population. Source: ACS 5-Year Estimates, table B01003.
